ent-WardrobeGreyFilled = grey wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with a tide of grey clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeGreyFilled = grey wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with a tide of grey clothing.

ent-WardrobeMixedFilled = mixed wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with a mix of colorful clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeMixedFilled = mixed wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with a mix of colorful clothing.

ent-WardrobeYellowFilled = yellow wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish yellow clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeYellowFilled = yellow wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish yellow clothing.

ent-WardrobeWhiteFilled = white wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish white clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeWhiteFilled = white wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish white clothing.

ent-WardrobeBlueFilled = blue wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish blue clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeBlueFilled = blue wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish blue clothing.

ent-WardrobePinkFilled = pink wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with fabulous pink clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobePinkFilled = pink wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with fabulous pink clothing.

ent-WardrobeBlackFilled = black wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish black clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeBlackFilled = black wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish black clothing.

ent-WardrobeGreenFilled = green wardrobe
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish green clothing.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeGreenFilled = green wall closet
    .desc = A wardrobe packed with stylish green clothing.

ent-WardrobePrisonFilled = prison wardrobe
    .desc = Contains a selection of nice orange clothes for people enjoying their stay in the brig.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobePrisonFilled = prison wall closet
    .desc = A standard-issue Nanotrasen storage unit, now on walls.

ent-WardrobeRoboticsFilled = robotics wardrobe
    .desc = You can build a robot out of this locker.

ent-WardrobeChemistryFilled = chemistry wardrobe
    .desc = The sleek orange threads contained within make you much less likely to be thrown out of the chemistry lab.

ent-WardrobeGeneticsFilled = genetics wardrobe
    .desc = The sleek blue threads contained within make you much less likely to be thrown out of the genetics lab.

ent-WardrobeVirologyFilled = virology wardrobe
    .desc = The sleek green threads contained within make you much less likely to be thrown out of the virology lab.

ent-WardrobeScienceFilled = science wardrobe
    .desc = You've read a couple pop science articles, now it's time for the real deal.

ent-WardrobeBotanistFilled = botanist wardrobe
    .desc = Plant yourself among the plant men with these 100% natural plant-derived clothes.

ent-WardrobeMedicalDoctorFilled = medical doctor's wardrobe
    .desc = We've all played doctor before, now practice medicine.

ent-WardrobeChapelFilled = chaplain's wardrobe
    .desc = You have to look presentable for your flock.

ent-WardrobeSecurityFilled = security wardrobe
    .desc = Cross the thin red line.

ent-WardrobeCargoFilled = cargo wardrobe
    .desc = This locker? Maybe 500 spesos. Brotherhood? Priceless.

ent-WardrobeSalvageFilled = salvage wardrobe
    .desc = Notably not salvaged.

ent-WardrobeAtmosphericsFilled = atmospherics wardrobe
    .desc = This locker contains a uniform for atmospheric technicians.

ent-ClosetWallWardrobeAtmosphericsFilled = atmospherics wall closet
    .desc = This locker contains a uniform for atmospheric technicians.
